if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND i.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdDlivItem :: selectById */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ds.code_label AS dliv_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_dliv_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ds ON cd_ds.code_grp = 'DLIV_STATUS' AND cd_ds.code_value = i.dliv_item_status_cd WHERE i.dliv_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdDlivItem :: selectList */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ds.code_label AS dliv_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_dliv_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ds ON cd_ds.code_grp = 'DLIV_STATUS' AND cd_ds.code_value = i.dliv_item_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdDlivItem :: selectPageList */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ds.code_label AS dliv_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_dliv_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ds ON cd_ds.code_grp = 'DLIV_STATUS' AND cd_ds.code_value = i.dliv_item_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdDlivItem :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_dliv_item i
